SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlottery

Class Event

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlottery.Event
public class Event extends Object
This class models an event in the Event Lottery app. It maps to a Firestore document at events/{eventId}; the waiting list is the subcollection events/{eventId}/waitingList/{deviceId}.

Note: getUserApplicationStatus / setUserApplicationStatus are for local UI only (e.g. EntrantHistoryScreenActivity); do not persist to Firestore.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Event()
    No-arg constructor; initializes selectionCriteria and coOrganizerIds to empty lists.
    Event(String eventId, String title, String description, String location, String organizerId, String organizerName, int capacity, int waitingListLimit, long registrationStartMillis, long registrationEndMillis, long eventDateMillis, boolean geolocationRequired, double price)
    Full constructor for core event fields (excludes promoCode, posterUri, selectionCriteria lists).

    Returns registration window start time (epoch ms).

    Returns selection criteria list, never null.

    Returns the event title.
    String

    Returns UI-only application status for the current user; not persisted to Firestore.

    Returns max waiting-list size; 0 means unlimited.

    Returns true if both latitude and longitude are set and finite.

    Returns whether the given device id is listed as a co-organizer.

    Returns whether entrants must provide geolocation when joining.

    Returns whether this is a private event (US 02.01.02).
    boolean
    isRegistrationOpen()
    Returns whether the current time is within the registration window (inclusive).

    Sets max accepted entrants; use 0 for unlimited.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Event

      public Event()
      No-arg constructor; initializes selectionCriteria and coOrganizerIds to empty lists.

    • Event

      public Event(String eventId, String title, String description, String location, String organizerId, String organizerName, int capacity, int waitingListLimit, long registrationStartMillis, long registrationEndMillis, long eventDateMillis, boolean geolocationRequired, double price)
      Full constructor for core event fields (excludes promoCode, posterUri, selectionCriteria lists). selectionCriteria is initialized to an empty list.
      Parameters:
      eventId - Firestore document id
      title - event title
      description - event description
      location - venue text
      organizerId - organizer device or user id
      organizerName - organizer display name
      capacity - max accepted entrants; 0 = unlimited
      waitingListLimit - max waiting list size; 0 = unlimited
      registrationStartMillis - registration window start (epoch ms)
      registrationEndMillis - registration window end (epoch ms)
      eventDateMillis - event date/time (epoch ms)
      geolocationRequired - whether join requires geolocation
      price - event price

  • Method Details

    • isRegistrationOpen

      public boolean isRegistrationOpen()
      Returns whether the current time is within the registration window (inclusive).
      Returns:
      true if now is between registrationStartMillis and registrationEndMillis

    • getEventId

      public String getEventId()
      Returns the event document id.
      Returns:
      event id, or null

      public void setEventId(String eventId)
      Sets the event document id.
      Parameters:
      eventId - id string

      Returns the event title.

      Returns the event description.

    • isGeolocationRequired

      public boolean isGeolocationRequired()
      Returns whether entrants must provide geolocation when joining.
      Returns:
      true if geolocation required

    • setGeolocationRequired

      public void setGeolocationRequired(boolean geolocationRequired)
      Sets whether geolocation is required to join.
      Parameters:
      geolocationRequired - true to require

    • isPrivate

      public boolean isPrivate()
      Returns whether this is a private event (US 02.01.02). Private events use invites instead of public QR.
      Returns:
      true if private

    • setPrivate

      public void setPrivate(boolean isPrivate)
      Sets private event flag.
      Parameters:
      isPrivate - true for private event

      public String getPosterUri()
      Returns stored poster image URI string, if any.

      poster uri, or null

      Returns stored QR image URI string, if any.

    • setQrCodeUri

      public void setQrCodeUri(String qrCodeUri)
      Sets QR code image URI.
      Parameters:
      qrCodeUri - uri string

    • getPromoCode

      public String getPromoCode()
      Returns human-readable promo code for manual entry (e.g. "555 555").
      Returns:
      promo code, or null

    • setPromoCode

      public void setPromoCode(String promoCode)
      Sets human-readable promo code.
      Parameters:

    • getSelectionCriteria

      public List<String> getSelectionCriteria()
      Returns selection criteria list, never null.
      Returns:
      criteria list (copy-safe empty list if unset)

    • setSelectionCriteria

      public void setSelectionCriteria(List<String> selectionCriteria)
      Sets selection criteria list; null becomes empty list.
      Parameters:
      selectionCriteria - list of criteria strings

      public String getEventType()
      Returns event type/category for filters and map tags, never null.
      Returns:
      type string or empty

    • setEventType

      public void setEventType(String eventType)
      Sets event type/category.
      Parameters:
      eventType - type label

      Returns venue latitude if set.
      Returns:
      latitude or null

    • setLatitude

      public void setLatitude(Double latitude)
      Sets venue latitude.

      latitude - lat or null

    • getLongitude

      public Double getLongitude()
      Returns venue longitude if set.
      Returns:
      longitude or null

      public void setLongitude(Double longitude)
      Sets venue longitude.
      Parameters:
      longitude - lng or null

    • hasCoordinates

      public boolean hasCoordinates()
      Returns true if both latitude and longitude are set and finite.
      Returns:
      true if valid coordinates

    • getUserApplicationStatus

      public String getUserApplicationStatus()
      Returns UI-only application status for the current user; not persisted to Firestore.
      Returns:
      status label string

    • setUserApplicationStatus

      public void setUserApplicationStatus(String applicationStatus)
      Sets UI-only application status for list/detail screens; do not write to Firestore.
      Parameters:
      applicationStatus - label to show

      public List<String> getCoOrganizerIds()
      Returns co-organizer device ids, never null.

      list of device ids

      Sets co-organizer device ids; null becomes empty list.
      Parameters:
      coOrganizerIds - device id list

      public boolean isCoOrganizer(String deviceId)
      Returns whether the given device id is listed as a co-organizer.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - device id to check
      Returns:
      true if co-organizer

      Returns device id holding the edit lock, or null if unlocked.

      Sets who holds the edit lock.

      editLockHeldBy - device id or null

      Sets when the edit lock was acquired.
